summary_ko: 용매를 사용하지 않는 건식 전극 공정으로 고에너지밀도 · 저비용 리튬이온 전지를 구현합니다. Roll-to-Roll 공정과 두꺼운 전극 기술을 통해 상용화 수준의 면적용량을 달성합니다.
summary_en: Solvent-free electrode fabrication enabling high-energy-density and low-cost Li-ion batteries. Roll-to-roll processing and thick electrode technology push areal capacity to commercial levels.
svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 260 160' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none' stroke='#0066CC' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><circle cx='40' cy='80' r='28' fill='#E6F0FB'/><circle cx='220' cy='80' r='28' fill='#E6F0FB'/><circle cx='40' cy='80' r='10' fill='#0066CC' stroke='none'/><circle cx='220' cy='80' r='10' fill='#0066CC' stroke='none'/><rect x='70' y='60' width='120' height='40' rx='4' fill='#FFF'/><line x1='78' y1='70' x2='78' y2='90'/><line x1='86' y1='70' x2='86' y2='90'/><line x1='94' y1='70' x2='94' y2='90'/><line x1='102' y1='70' x2='102' y2='90'/><line x1='110' y1='70' x2='110' y2='90'/><line x1='118' y1='70' x2='118' y2='90'/><line x1='126' y1='70' x2='126' y2='90'/><line x1='134' y1='70' x2='134' y2='90'/><line x1='142' y1='70' x2='142' y2='90'/><line x1='150' y1='70' x2='150' y2='90'/><line x1='158' y1='70' x2='158' y2='90'/><line x1='166' y1='70' x2='166' y2='90'/><line x1='174' y1='70' x2='174' y2='90'/><line x1='182' y1='70' x2='182' y2='90'/><path d='M130 30 L130 58' stroke='#00B8A9' stroke-width='2.5'/><path d='M125 52 L130 58 L135 52' stroke='#00B8A9' stroke-width='2.5'/><text x='130' y='22' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#555' font-family='Inter,sans-serif' stroke='none'>Dry Powder</text><text x='130' y='130' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#555' font-family='Inter,sans-serif' stroke='none'>Roll-to-Roll Calendering</text></svg>
representative_papers: 100 mAh cm−2 Cathode by Roll-to-Roll Process (Adv. Energy Mater. 2024)
Low-Resistance LiFePO4 Thick Film Electrode (Small Science 2024)
Mitigating PTFE decomposition in ultra thick dry-processed anodes (J. Energy Storage 2024)

summary_ko: 리튬-황, 리튬 금속, LiFePO4 기반의 고에너지밀도 셀을 연구합니다. 전극-전해질 계면 제어와 고유황 활용 구조로 사이클 수명과 용량 모두를 개선합니다.
summary_en: Exploring Li-S, Li-metal, and LiFePO4 systems for high-energy-density cells. Interface engineering and high-sulfur utilization architectures simultaneously improve cycle life and capacity.
svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 260 160' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none' stroke='#0066CC' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='30' y='30' width='40' height='100' rx='4' fill='#E6F0FB'/><rect x='190' y='30' width='40' height='100' rx='4' fill='#E6F0FB'/><rect x='75' y='40' width='110' height='80' rx='2' fill='#F7F9FC'/><line x1='130' y1='40' x2='130' y2='120' stroke-dasharray='3 3' stroke='#888'/><circle cx='100' cy='60' r='4' fill='#0066CC' stroke='none'/><circle cx='100' cy='80' r='4' fill='#0066CC' stroke='none'/><circle cx='100' cy='100' r='4' fill='#0066CC' stroke='none'/><circle cx='160' cy='70' r='5' fill='#00B8A9' stroke='none'/><circle cx='160' cy='90' r='5' fill='#00B8A9' stroke='none'/><circle cx='160' cy='110' r='5' fill='#00B8A9' stroke='none'/><path d='M100 60 Q 130 60 160 70' stroke='#0066CC' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='2 2'/><path d='M100 80 Q 130 80 160 90' stroke='#0066CC' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='2 2'/><text x='50' y='25' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#555' font-family='Inter,sans-serif' stroke='none'>Li Metal</text><text x='210' y='25' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#555' font-family='Inter,sans-serif' stroke='none'>Cathode</text><text x='130' y='148' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#555' font-family='Inter,sans-serif' stroke='none'>Electrolyte / Separator</text></svg>
representative_papers: Synergistic BN-Carbon Separator for Li-S Batteries (NPG Asia Materials 2017)
Hydroxylated CNT Enhanced Sulfur Cathode (Chem. Commun. 2015)
Encapsulation of S/SWNT with PANI Web (Scientific Reports 2015)

summary_ko: 차세대 분리막 설계와 복합 소재 개발을 통해 셀 안전성과 성능을 동시에 끌어올립니다. 기능성 폴리머 코팅, 계면 제어 기술이 핵심입니다.
summary_en: Advanced separator design and composite materials improve both cell safety and performance. Functional polymer coatings and interface engineering are at the core.
svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 260 160' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' fill='none' stroke='#0066CC' stroke-width='2' stroke-linecap='round' stroke-linejoin='round'><rect x='40' y='40' width='180' height='80' rx='4' fill='#E6F0FB'/><line x1='40' y1='60' x2='220' y2='60' stroke-dasharray='2 3'/><line x1='40' y1='80' x2='220' y2='80' stroke-dasharray='2 3'/><line x1='40' y1='100' x2='220' y2='100' stroke-dasharray='2 3'/><circle cx='60' cy='50' r='3' fill='#0066CC' stroke='none'/><circle cx='90' cy='50' r='3' fill='#0066CC' stroke='none'/><circle cx='130' cy='50' r='3' fill='#0066CC' stroke='none'/><circle cx='170' cy='50' r='3' fill='#0066CC' stroke='none'/><circle cx='200' cy='50' r='3' fill='#0066CC' stroke='none'/><circle cx='60' cy='110' r='3' fill='#00B8A9' stroke='none'/><circle cx='100' cy='110' r='3' fill='#00B8A9' stroke='none'/><circle cx='140' cy='110' r='3' fill='#00B8A9' stroke='none'/><circle cx='180' cy='110' r='3' fill='#00B8A9' stroke='none'/><path d='M60 50 Q 130 80 200 110' stroke='#0066CC' stroke-width='1.5' stroke-dasharray='3 2'/><text x='130' y='30' text-anchor='middle' font-size='11' fill='#555' font-family='Inter,sans-serif' stroke='none'>Porous Separator with Functional Coating</text><text x='130' y='140' text-anchor='middle' font-size='10' fill='#555' font-family='Inter,sans-serif' stroke='none'>Selective Ion Transport · Safety Barrier</text></svg>
representative_papers: A Roadmap of Battery Separator Development (Curr. Opin. Electrochem. 2022)
Synergistic ultrathin functional polymer-coated CNT interlayer (ACS AMI 2016)

summary_ko: BiVO4, TiO2 기반 광전극을 설계해 태양광으로 물 분해 수소를 생산합니다. 밴드갭 제어와 계면 밴드 벤딩 엔지니어링을 활용합니다.
summary_en: BiVO4 and TiO2-based photoelectrodes enable solar-driven water splitting. Bandgap engineering and interfacial band bending drive enhanced performance.

WO3/W:BiVO4/BiVO4 Graded Photoabsorber (Phys. Chem. Chem. Phys. 2017)
